SupplementalInformationDetail_Explanatio: The $97,000 reported in Part IV, column (c) represents the aggregate amount paid to GAM PRinters Inc, a 50% controlled entity of the chairman of the board, for printing services and postage during the fiscal year. Six bills exceeded 1% of the trade association's gross revenue. On occassion, the firm would also use its credit card to make purchases on behalf of the trade association and then be reimbursed by NPSOA. All purchases were reviewed for propriety and amounts were approved for payment by two other board members.
